data.title: Multi Ways Holdings saw 88% revenue growth in first half 2025, as revealed in unaudited financial results.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Multi Ways Holdings Limited released its first half 2025 unaudited financial results and corporate updates. Multi Ways is a prominent provider of heavy construction equipment for sales and rental in Singapore and nearby areas. Trading on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol MWG, the Company shared significant details about its performance and future plans for expansion.

data.title: Simmons First National Corporation to release Q4 2025 earnings on Jan 20, 2026. Live conference call to follow.
data.description: A company based in Pine Bluff, Arkansas, Simmons First National Corporation (NASDAQ: SFNC), revealed plans to unveil its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on January 20, 2026, following closure of the market. The management will hold a live conference call to discuss the figures.

data.title: Citius Oncology reports FY 2025 results. LYMPHIR™ launched in U.S. Raised $36M in financings, $18M via private placement.
data.description: In December 2025, cancer immunotherapy treatment LYMPHIR™ was introduced to the U.S. market, following the successful completion of $36 million in strategic financings. This funding included $18 million raised through a private placement and concurrent registered direct offering on December 10, 2025. These initiatives aimed to bolster the company's financial reserves and provide the necessary support for ongoing operations.

data.title: US shoppers make history with projected $1 trillion in holiday spending, driven by inflation. Retail sales to increase by 3.7% to 4.2% year-over-year.
data.description: The U.S. is on track to achieve a significant milestone as holiday spending is projected to exceed $1 trillion for the first time in history. According to the National Retail Federation, total sales for November and December 2025 are expected to range between $1.01 trillion and $1.02 trillion, marking a 3.7% to 4.2% increase compared to the previous year. While this figure is record-breaking, economists caution that much of the growth is "nominal," primarily stemming from inflation and tariff-related price hikes rather than a substantial rise in product sales. This surge in spending is also impacting the stock market, with movements observed in COST stock. To read more about this story and find out about the impact on the economy, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Citius Pharma reports FY2025 results. Subsidiary launches LYMPHIR™ in U.S. in Dec 2025. $CTXR on Nasdaq.
data.description: In December 2025, Citius Pharmaceuticals, Inc.'s subsidiary, Citius Oncology, introduced LYMPHIR™, a cancer immunotherapy, within the United States. Citius Pharmaceuticals, a biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CTXR, made this announcement from Cranford, N.J.

data.title: SeaStar Medical (Nasdaq: ICU) announces 1-for-10 Reverse Split effective January 5, 2026 on Nasdaq.
data.description: In Denver on December 23, 2025, SeaStar Medical Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: ICU) revealed plans for a 1-for-10 reverse stock split, set to take effect at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time on January 5, 2026. This move by the healthcare company, known for its focus on innovative treatments for critically ill patients at risk of organ failure, aims to enhance shareholder value. Following the reverse split, SeaStar Medical's common stock will trade on a post-split adjusted basis on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "ICU" starting at the market open on January 5, 2026.

data.title: HIVE focuses on energy and infrastructure, not hash rate. Expanding in Paraguay as strategic move for 2026.
data.description: The focus in crypto mining is shifting from hash rate to factors like energy efficiency and infrastructure development, according to HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. The company's leadership believes that success in 2026 will be determined by these factors rather than just hash rate. HIVE's Co-Founder and Executive Chairman, Frank Holmes, highlighted the company's expansion in Paraguay as a strategic move reflecting their long-term vision. This shift towards a more disciplined and global operational approach is indicative of HIVE's direction for the future. For more details, visit a full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CCSC Technology International Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: CCTG) announces financial results for six months ending Sept 30, 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Hong Kong, CCSC Technology International Holdings Limited, known as CCSC and trading on Nasdaq under the symbol CCTG, announced their engagement in the sale, design, and production of interconnect products like connectors, cables, and wire harnesses.

data.title: pcc Practice Builder™ expected to boost growth for medical practices in 2026, serving podiatrists, chiropractors, and dentists.
data.description: In Metuchin, New Jersey, on December 23, 2025, it was reported that as the year 2026 nears, professionals in podiatry, chiropractic care, and dentistry are encountering a swiftly changing digital environment where patients are making their decisions well in advance of contacting the office or requesting an appointment. The pcc Practice Builder™ tool emerges as a solution to navigate this landscape with an emphasis on helping these medical professionals adapt to the evolving patient behavior.

data.title: Seyond sees strong growth post-IPO, expanding into autonomous mobility, robotics, and sensing markets.
data.description: Seyond has experienced robust commercial progress following its IPO, as evidenced by increasing adoption in various industries such as autonomous mobility, robotics, and intelligent sensing applications. The company has shown strong momentum in these sectors, indicating a positive trend in market uptake.
US Secretary of War Hegseth authorized 350 National Guard members to go to Louisiana through February 28th.

data.title: Nanalysis closes first tranche of private placement, upsized amount undisclosed. (Numbers not provided)
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on December 23, 2025, Nanalysis Scientific Corp. (TSXV: NSCI, OTCQX: NSCIF, FRA: 1N1) shared the successful completion of the initial part of its non-brokered private placement of units. This offering is a significant step for the company and has attracted strong investment interest. The specifics of the placement, including the total amount raised and future plans, are expected to be disclosed shortly.

data.title: Aimco sells Brickell Assemblage in Miami for $520 million, plans to sell two more properties.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, Apartment Investment and Management Company (Aimco) announced the sale of its Brickell Assemblage in Miami, Florida for $520 million. The assemblage comprised The Yacht Club Apartments and the neighboring 1001 Brickell Bay Drive office building.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. announced January 2026 dividend rate at $0.24 per Common share.
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida, on December 23, 2025, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. disclosed upcoming dividend information. The Company, listed as ARR and ARR-PRC on NYSE, revealed that the January 2026 cash dividend for their Common Stock will be $0.24 per Common share.

data.title: Chatham Lodging Trust sells hotel in latest announcement, part of ongoing strategic changes plan.
data.description: A recent report highlighted a significant increase in global temperatures over the past century, with an average rise of 1.5 degrees Celsius. This rise has been attributed to human activities, particularly the burning of fossil fuels, which has led to a higher concentration of greenhouse gases in the atmosphere. Scientists warn that if temperatures continue to increase at the current rate, the world could face dire consequences, such as more extreme weather events, rising sea levels, and disruptions to ecosystems. To combat this trend, experts emphasize the urgent need to reduce carbon emissions and transition to sustainable energy sources. The report also noted that the past five years have been the hottest on record, underscoring the pressing nature of the climate crisis.
